title: Poetic Product Description
scenario: Create a poetic product description for a boutique jewelry store. The product is a handmade silver necklace with an intricate design inspired by nature. The description should be at least 50 words but no more than 120 words and should convey a sense of elegance and sophistication. Use metaphors, similes, and other literary devices to create a vivid description of the necklace.
constraints: Must use metaphors and similes to describe the necklace
Must be at least 50 words but no more than 120 words
Must convey a sense of elegance and sophistication

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the description use metaphors and similes to describe the necklace?
Does the description meet the specified constraints (word count and tone)?
Does the description convey a sense of elegance and sophistication?
